title: Welcome to Video Studio
content: Integrates slide graphics with AI narration tracks.
narration: Welcome to the Video Studio automated pipeline demo. This system generates technical slide presentations with AI speech automatically.

title: Core Pipeline Engineering
content: Image rendering is powered by Python's Pillow library.
Asynchronous TTS is handled using the edge-tts engine.
Stitching and final compilation is orchestrated by MoviePy.
narration: Under the hood, the image rendering is powered by Pillow, the asynchronous text to speech is handled by edge-tts, and final video composition is handled by MoviePy.
